title: QuantumScape to Report Q4 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
text: QuantumScape was slated to release fourth-quarter 2023 results on February 14 after the closing bell. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for QS' loss was pegged at 23 cents per share for the fourth quarter, implying growth of 8%. Escalating expenses remained a major challenge for QS, and the trend was likely to have continued in the quarter to be reported. For the full year 2023, QuantumScape expected capex to range between $75 million and $100 million and cash operating expenses to range between $225 million and $275 million, which might weigh on QS' upcoming results. The proven model didn't conclusively predict an earnings beat for QuantumScape for the to-be-reported quarter as it didn't have the right combination of the two key ingredients. QuantumScape had an Earnings ESP of 0.00%. On the positive side, the company intended to continue working on producing QSE-5 cells in large volumes with high quality and reliability, and QS planned to start shipping QSE-5 that year.
